thick_skin.summary: The board presses. You stop yielding.

effects.log: A harder shape settles under the rank.

executioner.summary: Weak pieces become visible by the places they fail to cover.

effects.log: The next blow learns where to land.

long_file.summary: One more square accepts your foot.

hoarder.summary: The dead leave small permissions behind.

effects.log: A closed hand opens in your pocket.

cartographer.summary: Fog remembers it was only a tile.

effects.log: A few hidden squares lose their nerve.
